crossing-original-bone-broth.name: Original Crossing-the-Bridge Rice Noodle Soup
crossing-original-bone-broth.description: A rich bone broth simmered for 12 hours, paired with 12 flavourful toppings and rice noodles. The broth is delicious and nutrient-rich.

crossing-spicy-sichuan.name: Spicy Crossing-the-Bridge Rice Noodle Soup
crossing-spicy-sichuan.description: Made with a signature Sichuan spicy base, featuring a rich and bold broth paired with 12 fresh ingredients and rice noodles. Full of spice and aroma, it offers a unique Sichuan flavour experience.

crossing-tomato.name: Tomato Crossing-the-Bridge Rice Noodle Soup
crossing-tomato.description: Made with a tangy-sweet broth from fresh tomatoes, paired with 12 fresh ingredients and rice noodles. The broth is tangy and delicious.

crossing-green-peppercorn.name: Green Peppercorn Rice Noodle Soup
crossing-green-peppercorn.description: Made with a broth of Sichuan peppercorns and spicy flavours, paired with 12 fresh ingredients and rice noodles, it offers a fragrant, spicy taste with a numbing aroma and refreshing flavour.

crossing-coconut-curry.name: Curry Coconut Crossing-the-Bridge Rice Noodle Soup
crossing-coconut-curry.description: Made with a rich broth combining fragrant coconut milk and curry, paired with 12 fresh ingredients and rice noodles. The broth is flavourful and aromatic.

specialty-smoked-intestine.name: Braised Pork Intestine & Red Konjac in Rice Noodle Soup
specialty-smoked-intestine.description: Featuring braised pork intestine & red konjac, paired with a unique spicy broth and rice noodles.

specialty-sauerkraut-fish.name: Chinese Sauerkraut Fish Rice Noodle Soup
specialty-sauerkraut-fish.description: Made with sauerkraut and fresh fish slices as the main ingredients, paired with a unique sauerkraut broth.

specialty-sour-beef-enoki.name: Spicy & Sour Rice Noodle Soup With Beef & Enoki Mushroom
specialty-sour-beef-enoki.description: Featuring a bold, tangy, and spicy broth, complemented by tender beef slices and delicate enoki mushrooms.

specialty-sichuan-fish-peppercorn.name: Green Peppercorn Fish Rice Noodle Soup with Mixed Vege
specialty-sichuan-fish-peppercorn.description: Made with fresh Sichuan peppercorns and a spicy broth, paired with tender fish slices and rice noodles. The broth is rich in numbing aroma.

specialty-tomato-beef-enoki.name: Tomato Rice Noodle Soup With Beef & Enoki Mushroom
specialty-tomato-beef-enoki.description: Using a tangy and sweet tomato broth, paired with tender slices of fatty beef and crispy enoki mushrooms. The broth is refreshing and light.

cold-couple-lung-slices.name: Sliced Beef and Ox Tongue in Chili Sauce
cold-couple-lung-slices.description: Premium beef and offal are paired with a special spicy chili oil, offering a fresh and spicy flavour.

cold-mouthwatering-chicken.name: Cold Cut Chicken with Chili Sauce
cold-mouthwatering-chicken.description: Tender chicken is drizzled with a custom-made chili oil sauce, offering a numbing and aromatic spice.

cold-yanbian-beef.name: Beef with Chili Sauce and Cilantro
cold-yanbian-beef.description: Tender slices of beef are tossed in a flavourful chili sauce and garnished with fresh cilantro.

cold-smoked-intestine.name: Braised Pork Intestine
cold-smoked-intestine.description: Pork intestines are smoked with fruitwood, delivering a rich aroma and tender texture.

cold-crispy-fish.name: Tilapia Fillets in House Special Chili Sauce
cold-crispy-fish.description: Tilapia fillets are paired with a tangy and sweet dipping sauce, offering a refreshing and well-balanced sweet and spicy taste.

cold-celery-pig-ear.name: Celery and Pig's Ear with House Sauce
cold-celery-pig-ear.description: Crisp celery and chewy pig ears are seasoned with fragrant vinegar, creating a tangy and refreshing flavour.

cold-potato-shreds.name: Potato Slices with Chili Sauce
cold-potato-shreds.description: Shredded potatoes are crunchy and refreshing, tossed in Sichuan pepper-infused chili oil for a tangy and spicy kick.

cold-tofu-sheets.name: Tofu Skin Slices with Chili Sauce
cold-tofu-sheets.description: Thinly sliced tofu skin dressed in a spicy chili sauce.

cold-cucumber.name: Cucumber Salad with Garlic & Vinegar
cold-cucumber.description: Fresh cucumbers are smashed and mixed with a garlic-infused vinegar dressing.

cold-seaweed.name: Fresh Seaweed with House Soy Sauce
cold-seaweed.description: Fresh seaweed is paired with a garlic and chili vinegar dressing.

snack-salted-crispy-chicken.name: Salty Popcorn Chicken
snack-salted-crispy-chicken.description: The chicken is crispy on the outside and tender on the inside, fried to a golden crisp.

snack-garlic-cartilage.name: Spicy Crispy Chicken Gristle with Garlic
snack-garlic-cartilage.description: Crispy and spicy on the outside, with a tender interior, enhanced by a rich garlic flavour that adds depth and aroma to every bite.

snack-fried-tofu.name: Deep Fried Tofu with Garlic Sauce
snack-fried-tofu.description: Fried to a golden crisp, with a tender inside, drizzled with garlic sauce.

snack-fried-squid.name: Deep Fried Squid Tentacles
snack-fried-squid.description: Crispy on the outside and delightfully chewy inside, these golden-fried squid tentacles are bursting with flavour.

snack-orleans-wings.name: New Orleans Fried Chicken Wings
snack-orleans-wings.description: Marinated in New Orleans-style seasoning, the chicken wings have a bold, smoky flavour.

snack-roujiamo.name: Pork Rougam
snack-roujiamo.description: Select pork marinated in a secret blend of spices, paired with a soft and chewy bun.

snack-crispy-ribs.name: Sichuan Style Spicy & Crispy Fried Pork Rib
snack-crispy-ribs.description: The pork ribs are crispy on the outside and tender on the inside, seasoned with spicy and aromatic flavours.

dessert-coconut-ball.name: Coconut Lava Ball
dessert-coconut-ball.description: Crispy on the outside, filled with rich and fragrant coconut milk

dessert-brown-sugar-cake.name: Fried Rice Cake with Brown Sugar
dessert-brown-sugar-cake.description: Rice cake is crispy on the outside and soft on the inside, coated with rich brown sugar syrup and sprinkled with delicate peanut powder, soft, chewy, and sweet.

dessert-red-bean-pumpkin.name: Deep Fried Pumpkin Pancake with Red Bean Paste
dessert-red-bean-pumpkin.description: Golden and crispy pumpkin pancake on the outside, filled with sweet red bean paste.
